name: ruiping
description: Repo-Roast is an evidence-driven repository review skill across architecture, security, performance, readability, and engineering. Scout defines one review scope, Deep Dive agents return neutral JSON findings, and Editor validates real file-and-line evidence before applying Flavor priorities and a professional, sharp, or savage Tone. Rhetoric never changes facts, severity, scores, or fixes. Use it to review, roast, audit, rate, or assess the health of a Git repository.
